/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/lsgfw.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,liblsgfw.so -o liblsgfw.so CMakeFiles/lsgfw.dir/src/lsgfw.c.o   -L/run/media/Data/Development/Projects/Personal/lsgfw/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/run/media/Data/Development/Projects/Personal/lsgfw/lib:/run/media/Data/Development/Projects/Personal/lsgfw/bin/lib/glfw-3.4/src:/run/media/Data/Development/Projects/Personal/lsgfw/bin/lib/glad lib/glfw-3.4/src/libglfw.so.3.4 lib/glad/libglad.so -lm /usr/lib/libgomp.so /usr/lib/libpthread.a
